| Listing exchange and ticker | Oslo Børs (Main List), Industrials segment, NOT STATED (ticker) | Indicative Terms, Field: Listing |
| Distribution format | Book-built offering to qualified institutional investors, qualified institutional buyers in the US via Rule 144A, retail investors in Norway | Indicative Terms, Field: Offering structure |
| Underwriter syndicate (top 3 names) | NOT STATED (Three undisclosed banks — to be named) | Indicative Terms, Field: Joint Global Coordinators |
| Lock-up period | 180 days (Issuer, Cornerstones), 360 days (Selling Shareholder, Management and Board) | Lock-up arrangements |
| Use of proceeds | The net proceeds to the Issuer will be applied to capital expenditure on fleet expansion, debt repayment, and general corporate purposes | Use of proceeds |
| Coupon | NOT STATED (not a convertible note) | - |
| Conversion premium | NOT STATED (not a convertible note) | - |
| Conversion rate | NOT STATED (not a convertible note) | - |
| Fundamental change mechanism | NOT STATED (not a convertible note) | - |
| Cornerstone investors | Storebrand Asset Management, Folketrygdfondet, A Nordic specialist sustainable-infrastructure fund, A Norwegian pension fund | Cornerstone investors |
| Listing exchange ticker | NOT STATED | - |
| Governing law | Norwegian law | Indicative Terms, Field: Governing law |
